plant.title: Staghorn Fern
plant.summary: Staghorn Ferns are dramatic mounted plants with two types of fronds: shield-shaped and antler-like. They are non-toxic to cats and dogs, making them a safe, artistic statement piece.
plant.contentHtml: Platycerium bifurcatum is native to Australia and Southeast Asia. In nature, it grows as an epiphyte on trees. Indoors, it’s often mounted on wood or in baskets. The plant absorbs moisture through its fronds and requires regular misting and occasional soaking. Its unique silhouette adds a bold, architectural element to interiors.
